featuredQuote.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
featuredQuote.author: Aristotle (via Will Durant)

tickerQuotes: Be so good they can't ignore you
Comfort is the enemy of progress
What got you here won't get you there

fullQuotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
fullQuotes.author: Buddha

fullQuotes.text: First principles thinking is the act of boiling a process down to the fundamental parts that you know are true and building up from there.
fullQuotes.author: Elon Musk

fullQuotes.text: Question assumptions. The things you think are obviously true might not be.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: Build for decades, not quarters. The best companies are built by people who think in generations.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: Your margin is my opportunity.
fullQuotes.author: Jeff Bezos

fullQuotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
fullQuotes.author: Chinese Proverb

fullQuotes.text: Actions reveal priorities. Watch what people do, not what they say.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: Stay curious, stay humble. The moment you think you know everything is the moment you stop growing.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: How you do anything is how you do everything.
fullQuotes.author: Unknown

fullQuotes.text: The obstacle is the way. What stands in the way becomes the way.
fullQuotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

fullQuotes.text: We suffer more in imagination than in reality.
fullQuotes.author: Seneca

fullQuotes.text: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
fullQuotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

fullQuotes.text: Be so good they can't ignore you.
fullQuotes.author: Steve Martin

fullQuotes.text: Comfort is the enemy of progress.
fullQuotes.author: P.T. Barnum

fullQuotes.text: What got you here won't get you there.
fullQuotes.author: Marshall Goldsmith

fullQuotes.text: Learn in public. Share your work before you're ready.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: Compound interest in all things - money, knowledge, relationships, skills.
fullQuotes.author: Personal Mantra

fullQuotes.text: The goal isn't more money. The goal is living life on your terms.
fullQuotes.author: Chris Brogan

fullQuotes.text: Rich is having money. Wealthy is having time.
fullQuotes.author: Unknown

fullQuotes.text: Simple is harder than complex. You have to work hard to get your thinking clean to make it simple.
fullQuotes.author: Steve Jobs

fullQuotes.text: The quality of your life is determined by the quality of the questions you ask.
fullQuotes.author: Tony Robbins

fullQuotes.text: Culture eats strategy for breakfast.
fullQuotes.author: Peter Drucker
